segments.text: In a Cyclone situation like that, getting caught is rough. But yeah, the side under pressure still wants to land their move quick.
segments.original_text: てる展開でサイクロン暴れとかされの苦しいですね でもねやっぱされる側は早く技を当てたいんですよ

segments.text: Right, so they get caught trying to—they have to commit to that KO option no matter what. Spring's stuck in it too.
segments.original_text: はい だから引っかかっちゃうんですよね どうしても撃墜択を通さなければならない これもスプリング引っかかっているが

full_text: In a Cyclone situation like that, getting caught is rough. But yeah, the side under pressure still wants to land their move quick. Right, so they get caught trying to—they have to commit to that KO option no matter what. Spring's stuck in it too. I see.

corrections.rule: move name (Luigi down-B = サイクロン)

corrections.original: 激推託を通さなければない
corrections.corrected: 撃墜択を通さなければならない
